children.name: hwNDPPortTable
children.description: Status of NDP function on the switch's port.

children.name: hgmpBatchUpgradeResultTable
children.description: Results of batch commands returned from member switches.

children.name: hgmpSnmpHost
children.description: The Snmp Host to send the cluster trap packets, which can only be configured and accessed on the command switch. The default value is '0.0.0.0'.

children.name: hgmpBatchSaveResultTable
children.description: The results of saving configuration files on cluster members.

children.name: hgmpHandShakeInterval
children.description: Handshaking interval of the cluster member switches. The default value is 10.

children.name: hgmpCmdClusterName
children.description: Cluster name of the command switch.

children.name: hgmpMemberResetTable
children.description: Reset a member switch in the cluster.

children.name: hgmpGrpMemberTableChange
children.description: Add 1 to the member list after it changes. The administrator checks if the value has changed. If not, it will not read the list once more.  The default value is 0.

children.name: hgmpUnrelatedPortNtdpAdminTable
children.description: The table of the commands to set the NTDP status on unrelated interfaces of cluster members.

children.name: hgmpUnrelatedPortNtdpAdminEntry
children.description: The entry used to set the NTDP status on unrelated interfaces of cluster members.

children.name: hgmpMemberRebootTimeoutValue
children.description: Timeout time of the member reboot operation (in seconds). The default value is 360 seconds.

children.name: hgmpMemberDisconRate
children.description: Disconnection times of the member and command switches divided by member number times 1000. The default value is 0.

children.name: hgmpMngPriIpSegCMIP
children.description: The private management IP address of the command switch, which cannot be modified after the cluster has been created. The default value is '0.0.0.0'.

children.name: hgmpBatchRebootResultTable
children.description: Results of reboot command returned from member switches.

children.name: hgmpBatchSynchronizeCfgFileResultTable
children.description: The result of synchronizing configuration files on cluster members.

children.name: hgmpCmdLanswitchFlag
children.description: Command switch flag. The default value is false(0). If the value is set to 1, the cluster name is 'huawei' by default.

children.name: hgmpSftpServer
children.description: The cluster members can access the SFTP Server through the command switch, which can only be configured and accessed on the command switch. The default value is '0.0.0.0'.

children.name: hgmpClusterCmdSwMac
children.description: The mac address of command switch. It will be 00:00:00:00:00:00 when not a member of a cluster.

children.name: hgmpPlugAndPlayStatus
children.description:
Status of the plug and play function. The default value is disabled(2)
.

children.name: hgmpStackMemberTable
children.description: Stack member table.

children.name: hgmpStackMemberTableChange
children.description: Change identifier of the stack member table. The default value is 0.

children.name: hgmpStackMainSwMac
children.description: The MAC address of the main switch. It will be 00:00:00:00:00:00 when not a member of a stack.

children.name: hgmpStackMemberDisconRate
children.description: Disconnection rate of the stack member switches. The default value is 0.

children.name: hgmpStackIpPoolStartIP
children.description: The first address of management IP network segment assigned by the master switch, which cannot be modified in the case that there is IP address assignment. The default value is '0.0.0.0'.

children.name: hgmpStackRole
children.description: Role of this switch in a stack. The default value is roleCASW(16).

children.name: hgmpNTDPInterfaceTable
children.description: Status of NTDP function on the switch's port.

children.name: hgmpNTDPPortDelay
children.description: Set the delay to forward the topology request via the ports, measured in milliseconds. The default value is 20.

children.name: hgmpNTDPTOPTableChange
children.description: Add 1 when the topology table changes. The network administrator will check if it has changed before accessing the table. If it has not changed, he will not access again. The default value is 0.

children.name: hgmpNTDPExplore
children.description:
The value of this object identifies whether to start collecting topology information.
                1 indicates to start collecting topology information. 0 is the default value, indicating doing nothing. The get operation always returns 0.

children.name: hgmpNTDPTopTable
children.description: Access the topology structure collected by the NTDP.

children.name: hgmpNTDPHopDelay
children.description: Set the delay to forward the topology request from each hop, measured in milliseconds. The default value is 200.

children.name: hgmpNTDPCacheTable
children.description: Access information about the switch from the topology table.

children.name: hgmpNTDPRun
children.description: Status of the NTDP function.

children.name: hgmpNTDPHopRange
children.description: Range of the topology collection of the command switch. The maximum value of this object may vary with different types of products.

children.name: hgmpNTDPLastTopCollectDuration
children.description: Duration of the latest overall topology collection, a performance count measured in milliseconds. The default value is 0.

children.name: hgmpNTDPCacheChange
children.description: Add 1 when the device table changes. The network administrator will check if it has changed before accessing the table. If it has not changed, he will not access again. The default value is 0.

children.name: hgmpNTDPCollectTopTime
children.description: Topology collection interval of the command switch of the cluster, measured in minutes. The default value is 0.

children.name: hgmpNTDPTopoLinkTable
children.description: This object indicates the topology link table collected using NTDP.

children.name: hgmpNTDPTopoLinkEntry
children.description: This object indicates the topology link information collected using NTDP.
